3207600.name: UNDERDOGS Soundtrack
3207600.description:
You know what this is.

You murdered hordes of robots to these sounds.

You sweated bullets to these beats.

You found yourself dancing a 5 ton metal ape to these tunes, barely able to hear your own thoughts ask "what in the F*%K am I listening to?!"

Well, this is it.

UNDERDOGS' Soundtrack.

19 heavy, handpicked and original tracks in both MP3 and WAV formats.

A unique mix of heavy UK Grime served on a platter of massive bass and filthy Dubstep, for you to take anywhere.

Go break the world!

*100% of the proceeds go to the artists, buying this soundtrack supports them directly.
